reviews.review_description:
Yes I too like this game but per the games discord the Dev has indefinitely stopped working on this which is unfortunate. If you want to pay for a game that won't be updated that's up to you, it's fun but no bug will get worked out every again.

It's a good game. Playability will be limited so choose wisely. 2 stars for great gameplay.

Whoever runs the discord is a sensitive d-bagg I hate I bought this game don't do it. He kept kicking me out cause I said the multiplayer is trash and still is. Also there is no goal to reach in this game it gets boring quick but all the people who said that guy is a d-bagg are spot on

This game has the best physics, best art, but the course design is terrible.  Especially the cloudy one where you cant even see where you're supposed to throw.
Get the other disc golf game instead even the the physics in that one aren't quite as good, the courses in that game are actually fun to play.
The best thing about this game is the driving range which is pretty fun but you can play that in the demo.  Full game feels like a RIP off.

Only thing I would like more is easier to throw short and long distance with like a power meter or something because throws are a little inaccurate but overall great game





Ps. Also add custom maps so everyone can create and play everybody's created courses and free or paid dlc if you would like

First, thank you development team of this great Disc Golfing Game.  I enjoy it very much.
The five unique disc types ? , when I open the disc Driver bag, a functional description (speed , weight, min and max distance or height )  of and explains clearly to the player how to choose from.   Because to me all 5 disc are the same disc with different  colors only.  What are the differences of each disc ???
May I ask for more from this great game already .  
Allow to play MP3 music if possible,  or YouTube video .
Can I have a dog alongside with me , and I can command the dog to bring back the disc to me if this is good idea.  Or allow me to play throw and catch with the dog or friends in multiple players mode if possible.  
Can the game environment to play at sunny or cloudy day and noon mid night with a lot of stars mode if possible,  or allow to play at rain just for fun.    
Please continue to improve or new maps and more game play if possible,  
I recommend this game to everyone to play, because it is enjoyable, relaxing fun game to buy.  Keep up the great work.   Thank you
it needs some polishing but is amazing enough to get out on the virtual courses and throw a couple rounds! cant wait for more development to happen, looking forward to greatness!

reviews.review_title: Great game, bug can't go past 1st hole
reviews.review_description: Played the demo, was cool. Bought game, can't proceed past the first hole of each course. Goes in, stays green lit, not allowing to proceed after trying everything. If can't figure it out, shouldn't be this hard, I'll have to return it. Reinstalled etc

reviews.review_title: Most realistic DG game on VR
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing this game via SideQuest since before it even had its current name.  It is both fun and a challenge to play (yes, sometimes I swear at trees!)  because the developer has really done his homework on the real world disc physics.  Sure, some aspects can still be polished, but overall the game is really impressive and well thought out.  The fact that you can play with friends is amazing, especially because we're still dealing with social distancing measures.

The developer is very active and is wonderfully responsive to any and all input.  Go ahead, try contacting him if you have comments or concerns (especially you, PGlove).  The game is really amazing software especially because it was built by a one-man band, although I know he has a talented artist that has begun working with him, too.

I cannot speak to the Quest 2, because I've only played it on the original Quest myself, but I don't know how there could be much difference there other than it being even more responsive since the Q2 has more horsepower.

The steam games that claim to be disc golf games are not even close to the level that disc benders is at. its honestly the best VR disc golf you can get. if you play disc golf please back this game and give it the notice it deserves.
Dad’s been playing this on Quest 2 for longest time, says it’s the best one. Got him a Quest 3 to match mine and we’re both unable to get past Hole 1, both solo and in multiplayer. Real shame.

This is a really good Golf game but there are some things I like to point out as an actual DIsc Golf player. Let's star with the good. 

Graphics are fresh and fun. Cartoon looking but not child like.

Gameplay feels realistic and addictive.

Courses are designed in a relaxing environments.
Sounds are good. I love how the disc look  pop out at you.

Best disc golf game there is and one of the top vr experiences as far as immersion. 
Addictive!

Things that can be worked on.

The fact you need two controllers is not what I went with. Real players shoot with nothing in thier other hand. So when I shoot I don't havev the other controller in my hand so it feels alot more natural. 

Tap in's

When you get near the basket in makes you tap in as I found my self not liking this method. I would like to have control when to tap it in. 

Course are fun but I like to see more short but challenging holes. Some of these holes take a lot of shots and that's fine but the appeal of mini golf is the shortness and challenging approach of it. Would like to see more of that in here.

Shooting.

Shooting can feel very fun and frustrating.  It's tricky as in real life but I feel real life is easier due to you actually let go of the disc as to the game you pull a trigger so it just needs to have a bit more momentum and have more natural feeling of release. Still feels fun throwing.

Over all.
Very simply awesome but needs some updates. I totally support the game at 15.00$

developer_response.body:
Hey Monster, thanks so much for the overall high praise - There's a lot here! And I appreciate you taking the moment to give your thoughts on the game, I do think a good amount of this is going to be really useful moving forward for us, and I'll be happy to continue doing our best knowing it's going somewhere positive :)

Funnily, we just changed the pricing around, and are still experimenting, but it's great to hear that amount works for you, we'll keep this in mind as we launch our next big update - More courses, and progression systems where you earn currency on each round, are coming!! Please do stay tuned!

I'd also like to invite you to the discord, where you can be part of a community of disc golfers who help build and share their opinion on the game  - https://discord.gg/YfQRmrt

reviews.review_title: Best VR Disc Golf Game I’ve Played
reviews.review_description:
Fair price, easy to learn and intuitive. Much better version of Disc Golf than in Rec Room.
That said, it’s still improving in quality as the developers seem interested in feedback and making gameplay improvements. Glad I strapped on the Oculus today and found this game!

developer_response.body:
Hey Chris, thanks so much for the awesomely positive review! We're really proud of where the game is and is going, and glad you see it in the same light :)
We look forward to continuing to improve, and doing big things for the game - Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: This is not very polished. Might be fine for a free game, but it seems like a Rec Room kind of game.   Returning it

developer_response.body:
Hi Steve - Sorry you didn't feel the experienced lived up to the price point for you. I assure you we do our best to provide a high-quality and polished game, so I wonder what aspects brought this down on your playthrough. I'd be more than happy to hear about your experience with the game and where you think it fell short - Please feel free to reach out :)
freefallstudios.games [at] gmail.com

reviews.review_description:
The developer of this game, Alexander Van Halen, PM'd me via Discord using a fake alias and verbally harrased me after leaving this review. He has supposedly done this to other discord members of a competitor's disc golf game.  Incredibly unprofessional and absurd behavior. Please avoid this app and do not support this so-called developer.

Original review:
Title says it all.  Disc physics are incredibly inconsistent and the dev clearly has no idea how to design a course.

I have played this game since the initial sidequest upload. I still think it's the best disc golf option in VR (least for quest). The progress made on the game since launch has been awesome. I believe the price is more than fair if you enjoy disc golf. The commitment of the dev is amazing.

developer_response.body: Hey Kfitz, thanks so much for your support - You've been along for the ride since near the beginning and it's great that you are enjoying the game on a such a level. We look forward to doing even more as the game evolves and grows, and only hope you'll be a part of that journey :)

reviews.review_description:
**Please disregard recent 1 star reviews as these were clearly written out of spite. It’s easily the best vr disc golf simulator out there and the developer deserves a lot of credit for doing it solo. **

As an avid disc golfer IRL I am a very hopeful but harsh critic of this game. That being said I’ve been playing it for a while now and I love it. The developer cares deeply about bringing us the most realistic disc physics and it shows in both disc flights and ground play. It’s incredibly rewarding and also heart breaking just like the real thing. Single player is awesome but multiplayer is a blast too so remember to join the discord channel to look for games. I am a Q2 user btw.

Update: Since I first reviewed there have been many improvements and tweaks that have made this game even better. The throwing mechanics feel very polished making all angles accessible to throw with power and accuracy. Can’t wait to try the Idlewild inspired course that’s being worked on currently.

I really am glad I've supported the development of this game.  I own multiple VR disc golf games and enjoy them all for different reasons.  Disc Benders has some really great presentation and ideas.  It does need some physics work IMHO, but the dev has been very responsive to feedback, including implementing some of my suggestions.

Overall I am really enjoying this game. I think it has a lot of potential. One thing I would like to see improved in this game is the throwing mechanics. I feel like it is difficult to get a good flight out of a disc and I wish there where more disc options. 

Looking forward to more updates in the future

I’m not sure I’ve ever experienced a video game that is both relaxing and challenging in the way that this game is. Even with the simplistic graphics, this game is able to create a calming environment in which it is easy to spend hours trying to perfect your throw. 

I have only played a few rounds of disc golf irl, so I might not be the best judge of the physics, but to me it seems pretty spot on. I actually watched a bunch of YouTube disc golf tutorials and was able to apply what I learned in those videos to this game which improved my scores a lot. The only thing I’ve noticed is that, because there’s no risk in losing, or hitting someone with, a physical disc, I have a tendency to overthrow. If you overthrow, you will run into the same accuracy and consistency issues that you would irl. I also tend to overthrow on the driving range because the baskets are oversized and it throws off my depth perception a bit. That’s a problem with me and not the game.

If you have even a passing interest in disc golf and you’re still reading this, just buy the game. At this price point there’s no reason not to.

I’ve tried several times in all configurations to play with a friend, we start the game, throw our first shot, and then one or both of us can’t see any discs in our bags or no way to proceed :S 
  THAT being said , this game has a ton of potential and is truly fun single player :) also ....
maybe do a tutorial of how YOU throw different shots on youtube ? sometimes i think i’m trying to hard and risk throwing my arm off or the controller through the wall :/ haha
